• Manages game state, rendering, and UI for a mining game with mobile support.
  • Implements procedural map generation, custom texture loading, and upgrade/shop logic.
  • Handles player actions, networking, sound, and persistent save data.
    Game.init();
    Shop.buy('drill');

This script initializes a multiplayer mining game, draws the world with procedural tiles, processes player input, and provides a UI for building, trading, and upgrades. It also includes sound management, cloud sync, and a custom modal system for prompts and forms. All features are controlled via configuration and runtime settings.
